aboutDescription: I’m a Full Stack MERN Developer and AI & ML Engineering student passionate about building scalable web applications and intelligent digital solutions. I enjoy turning ideas into real-world products using technologies like React.js, Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, TypeScript, and Python. Through freelance work, internships, and personal projects, I’ve gained hands-on experience developing production-ready applications, integrating APIs, and working on data-driven solutions. I’m especially interested in combining modern web development with AI and problem-solving to create impactful user experiences.
school: St Mary’s Multipurpose High School, Vashi
Engg: Zeal College of Engineering and Research
project1Description: Professional coaching institute website designed for course promotion, student engagement, responsive layouts, and modern frontend experience using React.js and Tailwind CSS.
project2Description: Educational coaching institute website with responsive UI, modern layouts, and student-focused sections designed for better online visibility and user experience.
project3Description: A modern full-stack ecommerce platform featuring authentication, admin dashboard, product management, protected routes, MongoDB integration, and responsive shopping experience.
project4Description: A Python Django-based News Portal with CMS functionality and user authentication. Users can browse categorized news while admins manage articles through the dashboard.
project5Description: AI-powered chatbot platform with modern UI, interactive conversations, responsive design, and intelligent frontend experience built using React.js and Tailwind CSS.
project6Description: A modern responsive restaurant landing page showcasing food sections, elegant UI design, responsive layouts, and optimized frontend experience using React.js and Tailwind CSS.
